title: Vanilla 3D Entities
description: Adds 3D models and variants to vanilla entities.
body:
# Vanilla 3D Entities
Adds 3D models and variants to vanilla entities.

REQURIES [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) and [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) or Optifine

This is an add-on to [Vanilla 3D](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/vanilla_3d) (but separate due to dependencies).

Adds new models to entity blocks and mobs and adds new variants to mobs through natural spawning and renaming.

Read "About Pack.txt" for full list of changes.
